prompt: Create a DC Universe-style comic book cover inspired by the style of the reference image.
prompt_refined: Generate a dynamic DC Universe-style comic book cover. The artwork should emulate the classic, vibrant comic book art style, bold linework, and overall composition of image 1. Feature multiple DC Universe superheroes in a heroic group arrangement, similar to the characters depicted on image 1, filling the majority of the cover. Include a prominent, bold comic title at the top, styled and positioned akin to 'AVENGERS ASSEMBLE!' from image 1, along with typical comic cover elements such as a publisher banner and issue details, all reflecting the vintage aesthetic of image 1.
objects: prominent, bold comic title at the top
